message:
fix(func): SUBSTR NULL start propagation and compileoption_get NULL check

SUBSTR(x, NULL, n) silently converted NULL start to 0 via to_integer(),
returning wrong substring instead of NULL. Added args[1].is_null() check
alongside existing args[0].is_null() check.

sqlite_compileoption_get(NULL) returned the first option ("THREADSAFE=1")
instead of NULL because to_integer() converts NULL to 0. Added explicit
NULL check.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
